---
title: "专题"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing: false
---

<style>
/* =========================================================
   专题首页 topics/index.qmd
   说明：
   1. 隐藏 Quarto 默认标题块，避免页面出现两个“专题”
   2. 页面结构：顶部介绍 + 三个横向专题大卡片
   3. 每个专题卡片占一整行，整个卡片可点击
   4. 不使用 ```html 或 ```{=html}，避免 HTML 被当作代码显示
========================================================= */

/* 隐藏 Quarto 自动生成的标题块 */
.quarto-title-block,
.quarto-title,
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 页面整体容器 */
.topic-page {
  max-width: 1060px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3.2rem 1.25rem 4.8rem;
}

/* 顶部介绍区域 */
.topic-hero {
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.topic-hero-title {
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 5.2rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.075em;
  margin: 0 0 1.1rem 0;
  color: #111111;
}

.topic-hero-subtitle {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.9rem);
  line-height: 1.35;
  font-weight: 900;
  margin: 0 0 1.15rem 0;
  color: #161616;
}

.topic-hero-text {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.95;
  color: #444444;
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0;
}

/* 专题导航标题 */
.topic-section-title {
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.2vw, 2.5rem);
  line-height: 1.2;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  margin: 0 0 1.35rem 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  color: #111111;
}

/* 三个专题卡片外层 */
.topic-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.25rem;
}

/* 每个专题大卡片 */
.topic-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 86px minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: 1.35rem;
  align-items: center;

  min-height: 158px;
  padding: 1.65rem 1.85rem;
  border-radius: 26px;

  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
  border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);

  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: #111111 !important;

  transition:
    transform 0.18s ease,
    box-shadow 0.18s ease,
    border-color 0.18s ease,
    background 0.18s ease;
}

.topic-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 24px 58px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
  border-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.99);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
}

/* 左侧图标 */
.topic-icon {
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  border-radius: 18px;

  display: grid;
  place-items: center;

  background: #f5f5f5;
  border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);

  font-size: 1.35rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  color: #111111;
}

/* 中间文字区 */
.topic-text {
  display: block;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
}

/* 专题标题 */
.topic-text h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.5vw, 2.2rem);
  line-height: 1.18;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem 0;
  color: #111111;
}

/* 专题说明 */
.topic-text p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #555555;
  margin: 0;
}

/* 右侧进入提示 */
.topic-arrow {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #2563eb;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* 手机端适配 */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .topic-page {
    padding: 2.3rem 1rem 3.6rem;
  }

  .topic-card {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 0.9rem;
    min-height: auto;
    padding: 1.45rem;
  }

  .topic-arrow {
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
  }
}
/* 防止残留空卡片显示成白框 */
.topic-card:empty {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

<div class="topic-page">

<section class="topic-hero">

<h1 class="topic-hero-title">专题</h1>

<h2 class="topic-hero-subtitle">把长期学习内容整理成几个稳定入口</h2>

<p class="topic-hero-text">
这里主要整理数学建模、数值分析和算法图解三个专题方向。
每个专题都是一个单独的内容入口，点击下方卡片可以进入对应专题页面，
后续相关文章、笔记和代码都会逐步归档到对应专题中。
</p>

</section>

<h2 class="topic-section-title">专题导航</h2>

<div class="topic-list">

<a class="topic-card" href="math-modeling/">
<div class="topic-icon">⌘</div>
<div class="topic-text">
<h3>数学建模</h3>
<p>从题目分析、模型假设、模型建立到代码求解，把数学建模的完整过程拆开记录，适合整理作业、比赛论文和常见建模方法。</p>
</div>
<div class="topic-arrow">进入专题 →</div>
</a>

<a class="topic-card" href="numerical-analysis/">
<div class="topic-icon">∞</div>
<div class="topic-text">
<h3>数值分析</h3>
<p>记录插值、拟合、方程求根、数值积分、常微分方程数值解等内容，用来复习公式、整理实验代码和总结易错点。</p>
</div>
<div class="topic-arrow">进入专题 →</div>
</a>

<a class="topic-card" href="algorithm/">
<div class="topic-icon">DAG</div>
<div class="topic-text">
<h3>算法图解</h3>
<p>整理查找、排序、递归、栈与队列、图搜索、动态规划等算法学习笔记，重点是把复杂问题拆成清楚步骤。</p>
</div>
<div class="topic-arrow">进入专题 →</div>
</a>

</div>
</div>
